title: Filter export question
excerpt: Are you able to filter a board and then just export that information…or do you have you to export a whole board?

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you able to filter a board and then just export that information…or do you have you to export a whole board?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mw01

Great question!

Any filters you apply to the board will also apply to the export, meaning you’ll only get the filtered data included in the export.
You can read more on this here: Excel Import and Export

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: rwilliams (Robert Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Dani . My filtered items are exporting, but not in the same order of their sort rules. Is there a way to make sure the excel export includes the filtered items sorted as they appear in Monday? Thanks.

posts.author: m.alegria (Manuel Alegria)
posts.cookedHtml: Exporting board to Excel retains the view filters but not sorting. Is this a known issue?
